meta.title: BREAKING: US F-16 shoots down allied Turkish drone over Syria
meta.description:
This story is still developing. 

On Thursday, Oct. 5, American officials confirmed that a U.S. Air Force F-16 shot down a drone operated by NATO ally Turkey over Northeastern Syria. 

The United States currently has some 900 troops operating in the region, supporting counter-ISIS operations with Syrian Democratic Forces.
